ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL linking to the issue's page */,
  "state" TEXT /* Current state of the issue (open, closed, etc.) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the issue was created */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the issue was closed (if applicable) */,
  "locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the issue is locked for editing */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of issue (bug, feature, enhancement) */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time to resolve the issue */,
  "spent_time" INTEGER /* Actual time spent resolving the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color associated with the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_labels" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id", "label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignees" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (developer, manager, guest) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_assignees" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned user */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was assigned to the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES assignees ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue related to the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (new issue, comment, etc.) */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES assignees ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue related to the version */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_versions" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id", "version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view the issue */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES assignees ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical change */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Field that was changed (e.g. title, state, etc.) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES assignees ("user_id")
)
